originalTitle: Kodak EC35 is a dirt-cheap point-and-shoot film camera
summary: Following the success of its $99 Kodak-branded Snapic A1, Reto Project is releasing the Kodak EC35, an even more affordable 35mm film camera for just $34.99. The EC35 certainly isn't fancy. Its 25mm acrylic lens with a fixed f/10 aperture and 1/100 shutter speed basically put it on par with a drugstore disposable. The fact […]
content: Following the success of its $99 Kodak-branded Snapic A1, Reto Project is releasing the Kodak EC35, an even more affordable 35mm film camera for just $34.99. The EC35 certainly isn’t fancy. Its 25mm acrylic lens with a fixed f/10 aperture and 1/100 shutter speed basically put it on par with a drugstore disposable. The fact that it has a manual wind and rewind only emphasizes that. And you can really lean into that disposable aesthetic thanks to its built-in automatic flash. Unlike the A1, there’s no double exposure feature here or zone focusing. The EC35 is designed to require almost no thought to use. Its one special feature is the sliding lens cover, reminiscent of the Olympus Stylus / Mju lineup. It also comes in a bunch of fun colors, including butter yellow, lavender, powder blue, blush pink, and avocado green. The lens covers are a slightly darker shade than the rest of the camera body, giving them some nice subtle contrast. Even the midnight black and vanilla white feature different colored accents, making them slightly more stylish than a disposable camera. Here are a few sample shots from the Kodak EC35: [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/00000025.webp?quality=90&strip=all] [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/rsz_sara_salamat_credits-14.webp?quality=90&strip=all] [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/Sara_Salamat_credits-19_0b20e4cf-ed2f-436a-b61e-da893cac52cc.jpg?quality=90&strip=all]
chineseTitle: 柯达 EC35 是一款非常便宜的傻瓜胶片相机
chineseSummary: 继 99 美元的柯达品牌 Snapic A1 取得成功之后，Reto Project 又推出了柯达 EC35，这是一款价格更加实惠的 35 毫米胶片相机，售价仅为 34.99 美元。 EC35 确实不怎么样。它的 25mm 亚克力镜头具有固定的 f/10 光圈和 1/100 快门速度，基本上与药店一次性产品相当。事实 […]
chineseContent: 继 99 美元的柯达品牌 Snapic A1 取得成功之后，Reto Project 又推出了柯达 EC35，这是一款价格更加实惠的 35 毫米胶片相机，售价仅为 34.99 美元。 EC35 确实不怎么样。它的 25mm 亚克力镜头具有固定的 f/10 光圈和 1/100 快门速度，基本上与药店一次性产品相当。它具有手动上发条和倒带功能，这一事实仅强调了这一点。由于其内置的自动闪光灯，您可以真正享受一次性美学。与 A1 不同的是，这里没有双重曝光功能或区域对焦。 EC35 的设计几乎无需思考即可使用。它的一大特色是滑动镜头盖，让人想起奥林巴斯 Stylus / Mju 系列。它还具有多种有趣的颜色，包括黄油黄、薰衣草色、粉蓝色、腮红粉和鳄梨绿。镜头盖的颜色比相机机身的其他部分稍深，形成一些微妙的对比。即使是午夜黑和香草白也有不同的颜色点缀，使它们比一次性相机稍微时尚一些。以下是柯达 EC35 的一些示例照片： [图片：https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/00000025.webp?quality=90&strip=all] [图片： https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/rsz_sara_salamat_credits-14.webp?quality=90&strip=all] [图片： https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/Sara_Salamat_credits-19_0b20e4cf-ed2f-436a-b61e-da893cac52cc.jpg?quality=90&strip=all]
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
